titleStmt.title: SII 38.263: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 263. (A.R. No. 263 of 1912.) NATTAM, MADURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west and north walls of the same temple.

summary.p: Built in and incomplete. Begins with a portion of the praśasti of the king, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara.

It mentions samvatsara-vāriyap-perumakkaḷ, consisting of twelve members, who were administering village (commencing) from the (Tamil month) Tulā, and an official of the queen. It also records a gift of land, in several pieces probably after purchase from the local assembly (chaturvēdimaṅgalam) in Sembūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam, by the official for providing food offerings (to the temple). Details relating to the supply of paddy to various services and wages to be paid to the service personnel are given. Among the boundaries of the land, a land owned by Śrī Vayiramēgha-dēvar is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
m poṟceyaṟ pāvaiyuñ cirttanic celviyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutuyilūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭuntuṭar vaṉaveli paṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷi
mum poru kaṭalīḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyumāṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻilmuṭiyu munṉavarpakkal tenṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum In=tara nāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala meṟi paṭaikkera
valai takkola peruṅkāval palpaḻantivum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentri coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu cempūrkkoṭṭattu
�ḻac caturvvedimaṅkalattu Iyāṇṭu tulānāyaṟu mutal grāmakāryyamceykiṉṟa paṉniruvar samtasaravāriya(r)p perumakkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyomum Uṭaiya pirāṭṭiyār kāryyamārākiṉṟa kanmiṅ �
ṉāḻiyumaṭaikkāyamutu saṇḍiyoṉṟiṉukku nālum patināṟu veṟṟilaiyumāka saṇḍi muṉṟiṉukkup paṉṉiraṇṭu pākku milaiyamutu nāṟpatteṭṭumāka nicati nellu muṉṉāḻiyumāka nicati tiruccanaṭaikku nellu tūṇippatakku nānāḻiyum tiruvārā
m nellu patakku mivaṉukku Āṇṭuvaraikappaṭa mutal kācu Iraṇṭukku nellup paṉnirukalamum paricārakam ceyyumāṇikaḷiruvarkku Āṇṭuvaraikappaṭa mutal kācu Iraṇṭinukku nellup paṉniru kalamum tirumaṭaippaḷḷi viṟakiṭuvānukku nicata nellu nānāḻiyumāka nāḷoṉṟinuk
ṟuṇi Āka nellu Irunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu nāṟkalattukkuk kuḻi+nukku Āṇṭu varai nelluk kuṟuṇi Aññāḻiyāka vaitta nilamāvatu poykaikaraikkum śrīvayiramekadevar bhūmikkum merkku Uvaccabhumikkuk kiḻakku meṟpaṭi bhumikkut teṟku naṭuvapaḷḷa
ṅ ke meṭu cāṇ kuḻikki kuḻinūṟṟu muppatum Iṅke teṟkkaṭaiya kuḻi Aiññūṟum pututtiruttu cuṟṟukku vaṭakku kuḻi Aṟunūṟṟu muppattu munṟe mukkālum pokaikku kiḻakku śrīkraṣṇapura devar bhumikku kiḻakku veḷḷakālukku teṟku kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupatteḻum pokaikku meṟku śrī kumarayaincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
